mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS trainerId, u.name AS name, u.profile_image AS profileImg, COUNT(DISTINCT mp.member_id) AS memberCount, MAX( CASE s.type WHEN 'YOGA' THEN '요가' WHEN 'HYPERTROPHY' THEN '근비대' WHEN 'BODY' THEN '보디빌딩' WHEN 'STRENGTH' THEN '스트렝스' WHEN 'REHABILITATION' THEN '재활' ELSE '' END ) AS mainSpecial FROM TRAINER t JOIN `USER` u ON t.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON t.id = mp.trainer_id AND (mp.end_date IS NULL OR mp.end_date >= CURDATE()) AND mp.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN TRAINER_SPECIALIZATION s ON t.id = s.trainer_id WHERE t.gym_id = #{value} AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY t.id, u.name, u.profile_image ORDER BY t.id DESC
